title: Strategic Homeland Division
summary: The secret emergency organization commonly called the Division or SHD, whose trained civilian Agents are activated when national systems fail.

claims.text: SHD Agents trained secretly for years and were activated after the Green Poison outbreak to help secure Manhattan.
Ubisoft describes Division Agents as a secret government cadre of highly trained civilians called upon in dire emergencies.
Within the fictional setting, Ubisoft links SHD's creation to a classified annex of Directive 51; the public real-world directive does not establish SHD.

paragraphs.text: SHD is a last-resort emergency organization built around trained civilian Agents. The first game's crisis activates Agents after ordinary response systems begin to fail.
The Division universe extends a real continuity directive with a fictional classified annex. That story device is not evidence of a real SHD organization.

verification.notes: Core institutional claims are based on official Ubisoft material; later changes to SHD leadership remain outside this first-pass scope.
